_comment: Hand-curated source of truth for the 2026 driver-rankings feature. Each entry is one outlet's published take on 2026 drivers. IMPORTANT: `ranked` marks whether the outlet publishes a TRUE ordinal ranking (position = overall quality, #1 = best) or a SEGMENTED / category guide (each slot is a best-for-X pick, in no quality order). Only ranked:true sources feed the consensus Borda table - otherwise a club an outlet crowned best-for-slow-swing (the last section on the page) would be mis-read as ranked-last. Category guides still feed the segmented tables, the priority breakdown, and the 'also available' list via driver-segments.sources.json. The `ranking` array is kept for every source (for segmented sources it is just the order models appear on the page, position 1 = that outlet's lead/overall pick). Model strings must match across outlets so the same club lines up. After editing, run `npm run rankings`. Sources that show an unranked showcase (e.g. GolfTec) or stale prior-gen clubs (e.g. T5Golf) are excluded entirely.

rankers.name: MyGolfSpy
rankers.title: Best Drivers of 2026
rankers.note: Most Wanted robot + human test, 42 drivers - overall podium ranked by measured score

rankers.name: Today's Golfer
rankers.title: We tested every golf driver of 2026
rankers.note: Neil Wain / GCQuad test - Best Driver 2026 podium, ranked by test result

rankers.name: Independent Golf Reviews
rankers.title: The Best Golf Drivers In 2026
rankers.note: Official Driver Rankings 2026 - an explicit ordered 1-12 ranking (Ryan Heiman)
ranking: Tour Edge Hot Launch Max D

rankers.name: Golf Monthly
rankers.title: 12 Of The Best Drivers I Have Tested In 2026
rankers.note: SEGMENTED: the Quick List is category-labelled (Top pick, Best wide appeal, Best fade bias, Most forgiving, Best low spin, Best value, Best for mid-handicappers, Best adjustability, Best looking, Best for high launch). Only Top pick is an overall #1. Feeds segments, not the ranking.

rankers.name: GolfWRX
rankers.title: Best driver 2026: high, mid, low swing speed
rankers.note: SEGMENTED: the article is organised by swing-speed band, not overall quality. Its picks belong in the swing-speed profile table, not an ordinal ranking.

rankers.name: Breaking Eighty
rankers.title: 10 Best Golf Drivers of 2026
rankers.note: SEGMENTED: category awards (Best Overall, Runner Up, Most Forgiving, Longest, Best for High Handicappers, Best Value, Best Mini, Most Underrated, Best for Beginners, Best for Slower Swing Speeds). Only the first two slots are ordinal; the rest are best-for-X. Cobra OPTM Max-K is the slow-swing pick (last section on the page), not the 10th-best driver.

rankers.name: GolfLens
rankers.title: Best Drivers 2026 - Data-Driven Rankings
rankers.note: SEGMENTED: an overall pick followed by category winners (Best Distance, Best Forgiveness, Best Accuracy, Best Low-Spin, Best Value). Only the lead (Qi4D) is an overall #1; the rest are category leaders. Feeds segments.

rankers.name: Hole19
rankers.title: The 7 Best Golf Drivers of 2026: Tested and Ranked
rankers.note: SEGMENTED (borderline): titled 'ranked', but each of the 7 is given a distinct role (Most Consistent, Max Forgiveness, Pure Distance, All-Rounder, Premium Feel, Forgiveness King, Value/Customisation) rather than a quality order. Treated as a category guide; flip ranked to true if you consider its order a genuine ranking.
